details: Read core SFPU implementation: ckernel_sfpu_swish.h (WH and BH identical). Uses SFPI abstractions with piecewise sigmoid approximation.
THRESHOLD is in UnaryOpType enum but not in get_op_init_and_func_default or get_op_init_and_func_parameterized in this file. Searching for additional dispatch paths.
Found ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h in both wormhole_b0 and blackhole, implementations identical

key_findings: WH and BH identical. Uses piecewise sigmoid approximation: degree-3 poly for |x|<=2.5, linear for 2.5<|x|<=5.0, saturation for |x|>5.0. Then swish=x*sigmoid(x). Uses v_if/v_endif for branching.

details: Found llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_params.h (params dispatch) and llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu.h (init/start/done). hardtanh has no API header or LLK-specific wiring yet - only the core ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h exists.

THRESHOLD exists in UnaryOpType enum but UnaryOpType::THRESHOLD is never referenced. ttnn.threshold does not exist at runtime. The SFPU kernel _calculate_threshold_ exists in ckernel_sfpu_threshold.h for both WH and BH. The bind_unary_threshold template is defined but never instantiated. This is an unconnected/stub operation with a working SFPU kernel.

key_findings: _calculate_clamp_ uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_elseif/v_endif), WH and BH implementations are identical, takes 3 params (min, max, offset), dispatch chain is INCOMPLETE - no tile API, no LLK dispatch, no SfpuType entry in Metal ckernels

details: threshold has NO API header (threshold_tile not defined), NO LLK dispatch layer, and NO metal SfpuType entry. It only exists as: (1) ckernel_sfpu_threshold.h in tt_llk for WH/BH, (2) SfpuType::threshold in LLK test helpers, (3) UnaryOpType::THRESHOLD in the enum (unused). The bind_unary_threshold nanobind template is defined but never instantiated. This is a DISCONNECTED operation.

All file paths exist, _calculate_hardtanh_ verified in both wormhole_b0 and blackhole. SFPU instructions: SFPLOAD, SFPSTORE, SFPMAD (via vFloat ops), SFPLOADI (via s2vFloat16b), SFPSETCC/SFPENCC/SFPCOMPC (via v_if/v_endif). No API header or LLK dispatch file exists yet for hardtanh.

notes: HARDTANH type registered in unary_op_types.hpp but get_op_init_and_func_parameterized has no case for it - would TT_THROW at runtime

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions: vFloat, dst_reg, s2vFloat16b, v_if/v_endif. Takes 3 uint32 params in FP16_B format. Implements clamp via shifted thresholds: val+p0<0 clamp to 0, val+p1>=0 clamp to 0, add p2 back. Both WH and BH implementations identical.
